zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱
zh.content:
当前以太坊兑美元处于窄幅震荡结构，价格围绕1777附近运行，整体偏整理略弱，未形成明确单边趋势。多空动能趋于均衡状态，市场观望情绪较浓。

技术指标方面，MACD仍维持正值但信号线缺失，动能释放有限，短期缺乏强劲上行驱动，反弹持续性存疑。多头确认仍不足，需进一步观察。

价格上方初步阻力位位于1793附近，对应20日均线，下方支撑关注1765低点区域，区间边界较为清晰，短期多空分界明显，震荡延续。

操作上建议以区间交易为主，未突破1793前不宜追多，回踩1765附近可分批关注低吸机会，严格控制风险，轻仓执行更稳妥，等待方向确认。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently trading around 1777.8, showing a modest 0.44% daily gain after consolidating within a tight intraday range between 1765 and 1780.42. Price action remains slightly below the 20-day SMA at 1793.11, suggesting short-term bearish pressure despite intermittent rebounds. The broader structure reflects a neutral-to-bearish consolidation phase, where buyers are defending lower supports but lack sufficient momentum to reclaim higher moving averages convincingly intra-day.

Momentum indicators present a mixed signal, with MACD reading at 16.019 suggesting underlying bullish momentum, though the absence of a signal line value limits confirmation of trend strength. The price hovering below the 20-day SMA indicates that upside momentum is not yet dominant. Overall momentum appears to be weakening on rallies, while dips still attract some buying interest, creating a choppy equilibrium.

Immediate resistance is observed near 1780.42, followed by a stronger barrier at the 20-day SMA around 1793.11, which now acts as a dynamic ceiling. On the downside, initial support sits at 1765, with deeper support near 1750 if selling pressure accelerates. Price compression between these levels suggests an imminent breakout or breakdown, depending on whether buyers can reclaim short-term momentum.

Given the current structure, ETH/USD is best approached as a range-bound market with a slight bearish bias. Short-term traders may consider selling into resistance near 1780–1793 while watching for rejection signals. Long entries become more attractive closer to 1765 or 1750 with tight risk management. A decisive break above 1793 would shift momentum bullish, while a breakdown below 1750 could extend downside pressure.
